description: This file contains utility functions for splitting a string by spaces into a linked list, including helper functions for validation and addition.

methods.name: split
methods.description: Splits a string into tokens based on spaces and returns a linked list of tokens.

methods.name: addIfValid
methods.description: Adds a token to the list if it is valid (non-empty).

methods.name: isTokenValid
methods.description: Checks if a token is valid by ensuring it is not empty.
